LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_NewMoon: The lunar body is entirely in shadow, with no visible illuminated side.
LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_WaxingCrescent: The lunar body begins to reflect light, with a thin curved bright edge.
LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_FirstQuarter: Half of the lunar body is illuminated, with a clear light-dark division.
LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_WaxingGibbous: More than half of the surface is lit, approaching a full circular shape.
LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_FullMoon: The lunar body is fully illuminated, forming a complete circle.
LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_WaningGibbous: The illuminated area begins to shrink, though the shape remains near-full.
LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_LastQuarter: The lit surface reduces to half again, restoring light-dark symmetry.
LanguageData.Wolfein.MoonPhaseTip_WaningCrescent: Only a small portion remains lit, the rest fades into shadow.
